subject: chemistry
title: 18M.1.SL.TZ2.17
question_html:
Which factors can affect the rate of reaction?

     I.     Particle size of solid reactant

     II.     Concentration of reacting solution

     III.     Pressure of reacting gas

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
